gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, TrangThaiLHP, SiSoDK, SiSoTD, SoChoCon, LichHocText, TenGV
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh
ORDER BY TenMH, HocKy, Nhom
user_question: Tìm lớp học phần của môn Data Structures and Algorithms (2+1)

gold_sql:
SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND CoTheDangKy = 1 AND Buoi = :buoi
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich

SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND CoTheDangKy = 1 AND Buoi = :buoi
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

SELECT MaSV, HoTen, MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, TrangThaiLHP, LichHocText, BuoiText, ThuText, TenGV, TGDK, LoaiDangKy
FROM (
    SELECT dk.MaSV, dk.HoTen, dk.MaLHP, dk.MaMH, dk.TenMH, dk.Nhom, dk.SoTC, dk.NamHoc, dk.HocKy, dk.TrangThaiLHP, dk.TGDK, dk.LoaiDangKy, lhp.LichHocText, lhp.BuoiText, lhp.ThuText, lhp.TenGV
    FROM v_dang_ky_hien_tai_sv dk
    LEFT JOIN v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du lhp ON lhp.MaLHP = dk.MaLHP
)
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY HocKy, TenMH, Nhom

SELECT MaSV, HoTen, MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, TrangThaiLHP, LichHocText, BuoiText, ThuText, TenGV, TGDK, LoaiDangKy
FROM (
    SELECT dk.MaSV, dk.HoTen, dk.MaLHP, dk.MaMH, dk.TenMH, dk.Nhom, dk.SoTC, dk.NamHoc, dk.HocKy, dk.TrangThaiLHP, dk.TGDK, dk.LoaiDangKy, lhp.LichHocText, lhp.BuoiText, lhp.ThuText, lhp.TenGV
    FROM v_dang_ky_hien_tai_sv dk
    LEFT JOIN v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du lhp ON lhp.MaLHP = dk.MaLHP
)
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY HocKy, TenMH, Nhom

gold_sql:
SELECT MaSV, HoTen, MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, TrangThaiLHP, LichHocText, BuoiText, ThuText, TenGV, TGDK, LoaiDangKy
FROM (
    SELECT dk.MaSV, dk.HoTen, dk.MaLHP, dk.MaMH, dk.TenMH, dk.Nhom, dk.SoTC, dk.NamHoc, dk.HocKy, dk.TrangThaiLHP, dk.TGDK, dk.LoaiDangKy, lhp.LichHocText, lhp.BuoiText, lhp.ThuText, lhp.TenGV
    FROM v_dang_ky_hien_tai_sv dk
    LEFT JOIN v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du lhp ON lhp.MaLHP = dk.MaLHP
)
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY HocKy, TenMH, Nhom

rows.LichKhop: thu 4 tiet 10-12 phong A5-402; thu 7 tiet 8-10 phong C1-301

gold_sql:
SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND Buoi = :buoi
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND HocKy = :hoc_ky AND CoTheDangKy = 1
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom
